summary: ULTRA Hybrid Services and Autonomous Integration Engine Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed. Fixed critical bug in ultra_video_conferencing import that was causing 503 errors. All new endpoints working correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/ultra_services.py - Fixed ultra_video import to use module reference instead of direct import (was getting None at module load time)
/app/backend/tests/test_ultra_autonomous_services.py - Created comprehensive test suite for ULTRA and Autonomous services
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ULTRA hybrid services and Autonomous Integration Engine endpoints tested and verified. Fixed import bug in ultra_services.py router.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/autonomous/status - Engine status with 8 integrations, 10 discovery sources
POST /api/autonomous/discover - Integration discovery from GitHub, PyPI, etc.
GET /api/ultra/image/status - Status with fal.ai backend available
GET /api/ultra/llm/status - Status with cloud backends via Emergent Key
GET /api/ultra/video/status - Status with P2P and Jitsi backends

ultra_combined_status.philosophy: Combine best open-source + commercial tools for superior hybrid integrations

bugs_fixed.issue: Video conferencing endpoints returning 503 'Video conferencing not initialized'
bugs_fixed.root_cause: The router was importing 'ultra_video' directly from the service module at module load time, when it was still None. The server.py sets ultra_video later during startup.
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed import to 'from services import ultra_video_conferencing' and access via 'ultra_video_conferencing.ultra_video' to get the runtime value
bugs_fixed.verification: All 19 tests now pass, video conferencing endpoints working

hybrid_services_summary.image_video: fal.ai cloud fallback active, local backends (ComfyUI, AUTOMATIC1111, InvokeAI) not installed
hybrid_services_summary.voice: ElevenLabs cloud fallback active, local backends (XTTS, Piper, Kokoro) not installed
hybrid_services_summary.llm: Cloud backends (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) via Emergent Universal Key, local backends (vLLM, Ollama) not installed
hybrid_services_summary.video_conferencing: P2P WebRTC and Jitsi available, LiveKit not installed
